$comment: USML 2026.05 — canonical source-adapter output example. Real Pattern object emitted by the Quoin reference adapter (the translation skill at /skills/quoin-pattern-translator.md) when translating the W3C ARIA APG disclosure pattern. Demonstrates attribution-complete output per USML §7.4 Translation attribution metadata. Cross-referenced from USML-Specification.bs §translation-attribution.
name: @quoin/pattern-disclosure
description: Disclosure pattern. Button + toggled content region. Foundational expand/collapse anatomy. Canonical USML source-adapter output example demonstrating attribution-complete translation from the W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide.

source.translationFraming: transitional — this translation will be retired in favor of native specification publication if and when the W3C ARIA APG publishes USML-conformant Pattern objects directly per USML §7.6 Native publication compatibility
